rationale: Educ. Code §7.107 governs board officer selection, organization, and chair term limits. It contains no provision related to homestead exemptions, property tax appraisal, or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The governor, with the advice and consent of the senate, shall appoint the chair from among the membership of the board.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict exists.
